title: cyperus merrillii
intro: Cyperus merrillii, also known as dwarf papyrus, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae, native to the Philippines and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and fever. The health benefits of Cyperus merrillii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Cyperus merrillii can be prepared as a decoction or infusion to be used in herbal remedies, and it is also sometimes used in traditional rituals and ceremonies.
